text:
Julie Horne
Educational professional with extensive international experience teaching, training, and leading in Canada, Japan, Portugal and China. A hallmark of Julie’s teaching philosophy is to empower students to become confident, independent learners who are not only proficient in English, but who possess the skills necessary to thrive in academic and professional settings.
Education
MEd, Language EducationUniversity of Hong Kong
BA, Applied Linguistics and Foreign Language Teaching
Julie’s research interests include language acquisition, teacher training and Content and Language Integrated Learning (CLIL) because cognition is developed as students’ are challenged to think critically, engage in deeper learning, and acquire knowledge through English.
Advanced Conversation and Culture: Tackling Tough Topics in English
Discussing Current Events
